sql1:
WITH ranked_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.title, 
        mt.production_year, 
        COUNT(cc.id) AS cast_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mt.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(cc.id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title mt
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON mt.id = cc.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        mt.title, mt.production_year
),
company_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id, 
        co.name AS company_name, 
        ct.kind AS company_type,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mc.movie_id ORDER BY co.name) AS company_order
    FROM 
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN 
        company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
),
highly_rated_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        r.title,
        r.production_year,
        CASE 
            WHEN r.rank <= 5 THEN 'Top Rated'
            ELSE 'Others'
        END AS rating_category
    FROM 
        ranked_movies r
    WHERE 
        r.cast_count > 0
)
SELECT 
    h.title,
    h.production_year,
    c.company_name,
    c.company_type,
    COALESCE(mi.info, 'No Info Available') AS movie_info,
    CASE 
        WHEN h.production_year IS NULL THEN 'Unknown Year'
        ELSE CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - h.production_year AS VARCHAR)
    END AS years_since_release
FROM 
    highly_rated_movies h
LEFT JOIN 
    company_movies c ON h.title = c.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON h.title = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Summary') 
WHERE 
    h.rating_category = 'Top Rated'
ORDER BY 
    h.production_year DESC, c.company_name ASC
sql2:
SELECT
    h.title,
    h.production_year,
    co.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    COALESCE(mi.info, 'No Info Available') AS movie_info,
    CASE
        WHEN h.production_year IS NULL THEN 'Unknown Year'
        ELSE CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - h.production_year AS VARCHAR)
    END AS years_since_release
FROM (
    SELECT
        mt.title,
        mt.production_year
    FROM
        aka_title mt
    LEFT JOIN
        complete_cast cc ON mt.id = cc.movie_id
    GROUP BY
        mt.title, mt.production_year
    HAVING
        COUNT(cc.id) > 0
        AND ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mt.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(cc.id) DESC) <= 5
) h
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        mc.movie_id,
        mc.company_id,
        mc.company_type_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mc.movie_id ORDER BY cn.name) AS company_order
    FROM
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
) c ON h.title = c.movie_id
LEFT JOIN company_name co ON c.company_id = co.id
LEFT JOIN company_type ct ON c.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN info_type it ON it.info = 'Summary'
LEFT JOIN movie_info mi ON h.title = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = it.id
ORDER BY
    h.production_year DESC, co.name ASC

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        at.title,
        at.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS actor_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) DESC) AS year_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title at
    JOIN 
        cast_info ca ON at.id = ca.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        at.title, at.production_year
),
TopTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        title,
        production_year,
        actor_count
    FROM 
        RankedTitles
    WHERE 
        year_rank <= 5
),
KeywordStats AS (
    SELECT 
        at.id AS movie_id,
        k.keyword,
        COUNT(mk.id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        aka_title at
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON at.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        at.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
    GROUP BY 
        at.id, k.keyword
),
MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        tt.title,
        tt.production_year,
        SUM(ks.keyword_count) AS total_keywords
    FROM 
        TopTitles tt
    LEFT JOIN 
        KeywordStats ks ON tt.title = ks.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        tt.title, tt.production_year
)
SELECT 
    md.title,
    md.production_year,
    md.total_keywords,
    CASE 
        WHEN md.total_keywords > 10 THEN 'Highly Tagged'
        WHEN md.total_keywords BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'Moderately Tagged'
        ELSE 'Sparsely Tagged'
    END AS tag_category
FROM 
    MovieDetails md
ORDER BY 
    md.production_year DESC, md.total_keywords DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.total_keywords,
    CASE
        WHEN sub.total_keywords > 10 THEN 'Highly Tagged'
        WHEN sub.total_keywords BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'Moderately Tagged'
        ELSE 'Sparsely Tagged'
    END AS tag_category
FROM (
    SELECT
        tt.title,
        tt.production_year,
        SUM(ks.keyword_count) AS total_keywords
    FROM (
        SELECT
            title,
            production_year,
            actor_count
        FROM (
            SELECT
                at.title,
                at.production_year,
                COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS actor_count,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) DESC) AS year_rank
            FROM
                aka_title at
            JOIN
                cast_info ca ON at.id = ca.movie_id
            GROUP BY
                at.title, at.production_year
        ) ranked
        WHERE ranked.year_rank <= 5
    ) tt
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            at2.id AS movie_id,
            k.keyword,
            COUNT(mk.id) AS keyword_count
        FROM
            aka_title at2
        JOIN
            movie_keyword mk ON at2.id = mk.movie_id
        JOIN
            keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        WHERE
            at2.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
        GROUP BY
            at2.id, k.keyword
    ) ks ON tt.title = ks.movie_id
    GROUP BY
        tt.title, tt.production_year
) sub
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC, sub.total_keywords DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        a.id AS aka_id,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.id ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        aka_name a
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN 
        aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
),
FilteredTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        actor_name,
        movie_title,
        production_year
    FROM 
        RankedTitles
    WHERE 
        rn = 1 -- Get the most recent title for each actor
),
DistinctTitles AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        movie_title,
        production_year
    FROM 
        FilteredTitles
),
CountedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        production_year,
        COUNT(*) AS title_count
    FROM 
        DistinctTitles
    GROUP BY 
        production_year
)
SELECT 
    ct.production_year,
    ct.title_count,
    g.kind AS genre
FROM 
    CountedTitles ct
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON ct.production_year = mi.info
LEFT JOIN 
    kind_type g ON mi.info_type_id = g.id
WHERE 
    ct.title_count > 5 -- Filter for years with more than 5 distinct titles
ORDER BY 
    ct.production_year DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.production_year,
    sub.title_count,
    g.kind AS genre
FROM (
    SELECT
        dt.production_year,
        COUNT(*) AS title_count
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            rt.movie_title,
            rt.production_year
        FROM (
            SELECT
                a.id AS aka_id,
                a.name AS actor_name,
                t.title AS movie_title,
                t.production_year,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.id ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rn
            FROM
                aka_name a
            JOIN
                cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
            JOIN
                aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
        ) rt
        WHERE
            rt.rn = 1
    ) dt
    GROUP BY
        dt.production_year
    HAVING
        COUNT(*) > 5
) sub
LEFT JOIN
    movie_info mi ON sub.production_year = mi.info
LEFT JOIN
    kind_type g ON mi.info_type_id = g.id
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC

    SELECT
        base.movie_id,
        base.title,
        base.production_year,
        base.keyword,
        base.cast_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY base.production_year ORDER BY base.cast_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t.id AS movie_id,
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            COALESCE(k.keyword, 'No Keywords') AS keyword,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_count
        FROM
            aka_title t
        LEFT JOIN
            movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
        LEFT JOIN
            keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        LEFT JOIN
            cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
        GROUP BY
            t.id, t.title, t.production_year, k.keyword
    ) base
) sub
WHERE
    sub.rank <= 5
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC,
    sub.cast_count DESC

sql1:
WITH TitleKeywords AS (
    SELECT 
        m.id AS movie_id,
        m.title,
        k.keyword,
        k.phonetic_code
    FROM 
        aka_title m
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        m.production_year >= 2000
        AND k.keyword LIKE 'Action%'
), 
ActorDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        c.movie_id,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        p.gender,
        a.imdb_id AS actor_imdb_id
    FROM 
        cast_info c
    JOIN 
        aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
    JOIN 
        name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
    WHERE 
        p.gender = 'M'
), 
MovieRatings AS (
    SELECT 
        m.id AS movie_id,
        AVG(r.rating) AS average_rating
    FROM 
        aka_title m
    LEFT JOIN 
        ratings r ON m.id = r.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        m.id
) 
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.actor_name,
    a.gender,
    t.keyword,
    r.average_rating
FROM 
    TitleKeywords t
JOIN 
    ActorDetails a ON t.movie_id = a.movie_id
JOIN 
    MovieRatings r ON t.movie_id = r.movie_id
WHERE 
    r.average_rating IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.title, 
    a.actor_name
sql2:
SELECT 
    m.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    p.gender,
    k.keyword,
    AVG(r.rating) AS average_rating
FROM 
    aka_title m
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON m.id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
LEFT JOIN 
    ratings r ON m.id = r.movie_id
WHERE 
    m.production_year >= 2000
    AND k.keyword LIKE 'Action%'
    AND p.gender = 'M'
GROUP BY 
    m.id, m.title, a.name, p.gender, k.keyword
HAVING 
    AVG(r.rating) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    m.title, 
    a.name

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        at.id AS title_id,
        at.title,
        at.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.production_year ORDER BY at.title) AS title_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title at
    WHERE 
        at.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
ActorRoles AS (
    SELECT 
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        c.movie_id,
        rt.role AS role,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ak.person_id, c.movie_id ORDER BY c.nr_order) AS role_rank
    FROM 
        cast_info c
    JOIN 
        aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN 
        role_type rt ON rt.id = c.role_id
),
MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.title,
        mt.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count
    FROM 
        aka_title mt
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = mt.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        mt.id, mt.title, mt.production_year
)
SELECT 
    rt.title AS Ranked_Title,
    rt.production_year,
    ar.actor_name,
    ar.role,
    md.company_count
FROM 
    RankedTitles rt
JOIN 
    ActorRoles ar ON ar.movie_id = rt.title_id
JOIN 
    MovieDetails md ON md.title = rt.title AND md.production_year = rt.production_year
WHERE 
    ar.role_rank = 1 
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, 
    rt.title
sql2:
SELECT 
    rt.title AS Ranked_Title,
    rt.production_year,
    ar.actor_name,
    ar.role,
    md.company_count
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            at.id AS title_id,
            at.title,
            at.production_year,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.production_year ORDER BY at.title) AS title_rank
        FROM 
            aka_title at
        WHERE 
            at.production_year IS NOT NULL
    ) rt
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            ak.name AS actor_name,
            c.movie_id,
            rt2.role AS role,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ak.person_id, c.movie_id ORDER BY c.nr_order) AS role_rank
        FROM 
            cast_info c
        JOIN 
            aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
        JOIN 
            role_type rt2 ON rt2.id = c.role_id
    ) ar ON ar.movie_id = rt.title_id AND ar.role_rank = 1
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            mt.title,
            mt.production_year,
            COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count
        FROM 
            aka_title mt
        JOIN 
            movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = mt.movie_id
        GROUP BY 
            mt.id, mt.title, mt.production_year
    ) md ON md.title = rt.title AND md.production_year = rt.production_year
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, 
    rt.title

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        m.id AS movie_id,
        m.title,
        m.production_year,
        a.name AS director_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT kc.keyword) AS keyword_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY m.production_year DESC, COUNT(DISTINCT kc.keyword) DESC) AS movie_rank
    FROM 
        title m
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id AND c.company_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'Director')
    JOIN 
        aka_name a ON c.imdb_id = a.person_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword kc ON mk.keyword_id = kc.id
    GROUP BY 
        m.id, m.title, m.production_year, a.name
), MovieInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        rm.movie_id,
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year,
        rm.director_name,
        rm.keyword_count,
        COALESCE(mi.info, 'No Information') AS additional_info
    FROM 
        RankedMovies rm
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_info mi ON rm.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Summary')
)
SELECT 
    movie_id,
    title,
    production_year,
    director_name,
    keyword_count,
    additional_info
FROM 
    MovieInfo
WHERE 
    movie_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    production_year DESC, keyword_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.movie_id,
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.director_name,
    sub.keyword_count,
    COALESCE(mi.info, 'No Information') AS additional_info
FROM (
    SELECT
        m.id AS movie_id,
        m.title,
        m.production_year,
        a.name AS director_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT kc.keyword) AS keyword_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY m.production_year DESC, COUNT(DISTINCT kc.keyword) DESC) AS movie_rank
    FROM
        title m
    JOIN
        movie_companies mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    JOIN
        company_type ct ON c.company_type_id = ct.id AND ct.kind = 'Director'
    JOIN
        aka_name a ON c.imdb_id = a.person_id
    LEFT JOIN
        movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN
        keyword kc ON mk.keyword_id = kc.id
    GROUP BY
        m.id, m.title, m.production_year, a.name
) sub
LEFT JOIN
    info_type it ON it.info = 'Summary'
LEFT JOIN
    movie_info mi ON sub.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE
    sub.movie_rank <= 10
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC, sub.keyword_count DESC

sql1:
WITH movie_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN mi.info_type_id = 1 THEN mi.info END) AS director,
        COUNT(DISTINCT kc.keyword) AS keyword_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN mi.info_type_id = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_synopsis,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count
    FROM 
        title t
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword kc ON mk.keyword_id = kc.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        t.id
),
ranked_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.movie_id,
        ms.director,
        ms.keyword_count,
        ms.cast_count,
        ms.has_synopsis,
        ms.company_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ms.keyword_count DESC, ms.cast_count DESC, ms.company_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        movie_scores ms
)
SELECT 
    r.movie_id,
    r.director,
    r.keyword_count,
    r.cast_count,
    r.has_synopsis,
    r.company_count,
    r.rank
FROM 
    ranked_movies r
WHERE 
    r.rank <= 10
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.movie_id,
    sub.director,
    sub.keyword_count,
    sub.cast_count,
    sub.has_synopsis,
    sub.company_count,
    sub.rank
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.id AS movie_id,
        (SELECT MAX(mi.info) FROM movie_info mi WHERE mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = 1) AS director,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) FROM movie_keyword mk JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id) AS keyword_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) FROM complete_cast cc JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id WHERE cc.movie_id = t.id) AS cast_count,
        (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN mi2.info_type_id = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM movie_info mi2 WHERE mi2.movie_id = t.id) AS has_synopsis,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) FROM movie_companies mc WHERE mc.movie_id = t.id) AS company_count,
        RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY
                (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) FROM movie_keyword mk JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id) DESC,
                (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) FROM complete_cast cc JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id WHERE cc.movie_id = t.id) DESC,
                (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) FROM movie_companies mc WHERE mc.movie_id = t.id) DESC
        ) AS rank
    FROM title t
) sub
WHERE sub.rank <= 10

sql1:
WITH ActorMovieCount AS (
    SELECT 
        a.id AS actor_id,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        aka_name a
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        a.id, a.name
),
MovieKeywordCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        m.id AS movie_id,
        m.title AS movie_title,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        aka_title m
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        m.id, m.title
),
HighProfileActors AS (
    SELECT 
        am.actor_id,
        am.actor_name
    FROM 
        ActorMovieCount am
    WHERE 
        am.movie_count > 10
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        mk.movie_id,
        mk.movie_title,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY mk.keyword_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        MovieKeywordCounts mk
    WHERE 
        mk.keyword_count > 5
)
SELECT 
    h.actor_name,
    t.movie_title,
    t.rank
FROM 
    HighProfileActors h
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON h.actor_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    TopMovies t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    h.actor_name, t.rank
sql2:
SELECT 
    h.actor_name,
    t.movie_title,
    t.rank
FROM 
    (
        SELECT a.id AS actor_id, a.name AS actor_name
        FROM aka_name a
        WHERE (
            SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c0.movie_id)
            FROM cast_info c0
            WHERE c0.person_id = a.person_id
        ) > 10
    ) h
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON h.actor_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            sub.movie_id,
            sub.movie_title,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sub.keyword_count DESC) AS rank
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                m.id AS movie_id,
                m.title AS movie_title,
                COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
            FROM 
                aka_title m
            JOIN 
                movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
            GROUP BY 
                m.id, m.title
            HAVING 
                COUNT(mk.keyword_id) > 5
        ) sub
    ) t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    h.actor_name, t.rank

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title,
        a.production_year,
        k.keyword,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_count
    FROM 
        aka_title a
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON a.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON a.id = ci.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        a.title, a.production_year, k.keyword
), 
HighCastMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        title,
        production_year,
        keyword,
        cast_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY keyword ORDER BY cast_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        RankedTitles
)
SELECT 
    hcm.title,
    hcm.production_year,
    hcm.keyword,
    hcm.cast_count
FROM 
    HighCastMovies hcm
WHERE 
    hcm.rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    hcm.keyword, 
    hcm.cast_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.keyword,
    sub.cast_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        agg.title,
        agg.production_year,
        agg.keyword,
        agg.cast_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY agg.keyword ORDER BY agg.cast_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM (
        SELECT
            a.title,
            a.production_year,
            k.keyword,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_count
        FROM
            aka_title a
        INNER JOIN
            movie_keyword mk ON a.id = mk.movie_id
        INNER JOIN
            keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        LEFT JOIN
            cast_info ci ON a.id = ci.movie_id
        GROUP BY
            a.title, a.production_year, k.keyword
    ) agg
) sub
WHERE
    sub.rank <= 5
ORDER BY
    sub.keyword,
    sub.cast_count DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        at.title,
        at.production_year,
        count(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.id ORDER BY at.production_year DESC) AS title_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title at
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON at.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        at.id, at.title, at.production_year
),
FilteredTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        rt.title, 
        rt.production_year,
        rt.company_count,
        ra.name AS director_name
    FROM 
        RankedTitles rt
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON rt.title = ci.movie_id 
    JOIN 
        aka_name ra ON ci.person_id = ra.person_id 
    WHERE 
        ci.person_role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'Director')
        AND rt.title_rank = 1
),
KeyWordCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.movie_id, 
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword mk
    JOIN 
        movie_info mi ON mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        mt.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    ft.title,
    ft.production_year,
    ft.company_count,
    ft.director_name,
    kwc.keyword_count
FROM 
    FilteredTitles ft
LEFT JOIN 
    KeyWordCounts kwc ON ft.movie_id = kwc.movie_id
WHERE 
    ft.company_count > 3
ORDER BY 
    ft.production_year DESC, ft.title
sql2:
SELECT 
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.company_count,
    sub.director_name,
    kwc.keyword_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        rt.title,
        rt.production_year,
        rt.company_count,
        ra.name AS director_name,
        rt.movie_id
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            at.id,
            at.title,
            at.production_year,
            at.movie_id,
            COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.id ORDER BY at.production_year DESC) AS title_rank
        FROM 
            aka_title at
        JOIN 
            movie_companies mc ON at.movie_id = mc.movie_id
        GROUP BY 
            at.id, at.title, at.production_year
    ) rt
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON rt.title = ci.movie_id
    JOIN 
        role_type rty ON ci.person_role_id = rty.id AND rty.role = 'Director'
    JOIN 
        aka_name ra ON ci.person_id = ra.person_id
    WHERE 
        rt.title_rank = 1
) sub
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        mt.movie_id,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword mk
    JOIN 
        movie_info mi ON mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        mt.movie_id
) kwc ON sub.movie_id = kwc.movie_id
WHERE 
    sub.company_count > 3
ORDER BY 
    sub.production_year DESC, sub.title

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        k.keyword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k.keyword ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
MostRecentTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        title_id,
        title,
        production_year,
        keyword
    FROM 
        RankedTitles
    WHERE 
        rank = 1
),
ActorRoles AS (
    SELECT 
        ci.movie_id,
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        rt.role AS role
    FROM 
        cast_info ci
    JOIN 
        aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
    JOIN 
        role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
)
SELECT 
    mrt.title,
    mrt.production_year,
    mrt.keyword,
    ar.actor_name,
    ar.role
FROM 
    MostRecentTitles mrt
JOIN 
    ActorRoles ar ON mrt.title_id = ar.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    mrt.production_year DESC, 
    mrt.title
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.keyword,
    ak.name AS actor_name,
    rt.role AS role
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        k.keyword
    FROM
        aka_title t
    JOIN
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k.keyword ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) = 1
) sub
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON sub.title_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
JOIN
    role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC,
    sub.title

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS year_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
ActorMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.id AS actor_id,
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        rm.movie_id,
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year
    FROM 
        cast_info ci
    JOIN 
        aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
    JOIN 
        RankedMovies rm ON ci.movie_id = rm.movie_id
),
MovieStats AS (
    SELECT 
        am.actor_id,
        am.actor_name,
        COUNT(am.movie_id) AS movie_count,
        AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, am.production_year))) AS average_movie_age
    FROM 
        ActorMovies am
    GROUP BY 
        am.actor_id, am.actor_name
)
SELECT 
    ms.actor_id,
    ms.actor_name,
    ms.movie_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN ms.average_movie_age IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
        ELSE TO_CHAR(ms.average_movie_age, '999.99')
    END AS average_movie_age,
    COALESCE(mk.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    MovieStats ms
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        COUNT(keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword 
    GROUP BY 
        movie_id
) mk ON mk.movie_id IN (SELECT am.movie_id FROM ActorMovies am WHERE am.actor_id = ms.actor_id)
ORDER BY 
    ms.movie_count DESC, 
    ms.actor_name
sql2:
SELECT 
    ms.actor_id,
    ms.actor_name,
    ms.movie_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN ms.average_movie_age IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
        ELSE TO_CHAR(ms.average_movie_age, '999.99')
    END AS average_movie_age,
    COALESCE(mk.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ak.id AS actor_id,
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(t.id) AS movie_count,
        AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, t.production_year))) AS average_movie_age
    FROM 
        cast_info ci
    JOIN aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
    JOIN aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE t.production_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ak.id, ak.name
) ms
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        COUNT(keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword 
    GROUP BY 
        movie_id
) mk ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM cast_info ci2
    JOIN aka_name ak2 ON ci2.person_id = ak2.person_id
    JOIN aka_title t2 ON ci2.movie_id = t2.id
    WHERE t2.production_year IS NOT NULL
      AND ak2.id = ms.actor_id
      AND t2.id = mk.movie_id
)
ORDER BY 
    ms.movie_count DESC, 
    ms.actor_name

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        k.keyword,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS total_cast_members,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.id ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS movie_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON c.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL 
        AND k.keyword IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year, k.keyword
),

KeywordStats AS (
    SELECT 
        keyword,
        COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
    GROUP BY 
        keyword
    HAVING 
        COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) > 1
),

TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        title,
        production_year,
        total_cast_members,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_cast_members DESC) AS cast_rank
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
    WHERE 
        movie_rank = 1
)

SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    tm.total_cast_members,
    ks.keyword,
    ks.movie_count
FROM 
    TopMovies tm
JOIN 
    KeywordStats ks ON tm.movie_id IN (
        SELECT 
            mk.movie_id
        FROM 
            movie_keyword mk
        JOIN 
            keyword kw ON mk.keyword_id = kw.id
        WHERE 
            kw.keyword = ks.keyword
    )
WHERE 
    tm.cast_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    tm.total_cast_members DESC, 
    ks.movie_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    tm.total_cast_members,
    ks.keyword,
    ks.movie_count
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            movie_id,
            title,
            production_year,
            total_cast_members,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_cast_members DESC) AS cast_rank
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t.id AS movie_id,
                t.title,
                t.production_year,
                k.keyword,
                COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS total_cast_members,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.id ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS movie_rank
            FROM 
                aka_title t
            JOIN 
                movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
            JOIN 
                keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
            JOIN 
                cast_info c ON c.movie_id = t.id
            WHERE 
                t.production_year IS NOT NULL 
                AND k.keyword IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY 
                t.id, t.title, t.production_year, k.keyword
        ) rm
        WHERE rm.movie_rank = 1
    ) tm
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            rm2.keyword,
            COUNT(DISTINCT rm2.movie_id) AS movie_count
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t.id AS movie_id,
                k.keyword
            FROM 
                aka_title t
            JOIN 
                movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
            JOIN 
                keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
            JOIN 
                cast_info c ON c.movie_id = t.id
            WHERE 
                t.production_year IS NOT NULL 
                AND k.keyword IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY 
                t.id, t.title, t.production_year, k.keyword
        ) rm2
        GROUP BY 
            rm2.keyword
        HAVING 
            COUNT(DISTINCT rm2.movie_id) > 1
    ) ks ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM movie_keyword mk
        JOIN keyword kw ON mk.keyword_id = kw.id
        WHERE mk.movie_id = tm.movie_id
          AND kw.keyword = ks.keyword
    )
WHERE 
    tm.cast_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    tm.total_cast_members DESC, 
    ks.movie_count DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        title.title AS movie_title,
        title.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cast_info.person_id) AS actor_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY title.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT cast_info.person_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        title
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ON title.id = cast_info.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        title.id
), 
RecentMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_title, 
        production_year, 
        actor_count 
    FROM 
        RankedMovies 
    WHERE 
        production_year >= (SELECT MAX(production_year) - 10 FROM title)
),
CompanyMovieCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_companies.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT company_name.id) AS company_count
    FROM 
        movie_companies
    JOIN 
        company_name ON movie_companies.company_id = company_name.id
    WHERE 
        company_name.country_code IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        movie_companies.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    r.movie_title,
    r.production_year,
    r.actor_count,
    COALESCE(c.company_count, 0) AS company_count
FROM 
    RecentMovies r
LEFT JOIN 
    CompanyMovieCounts c ON r.movie_title = (SELECT title FROM title WHERE id = c.movie_id)
WHERE 
    r.actor_count > 2
ORDER BY 
    r.production_year DESC, r.actor_count DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT
    r.movie_title,
    r.production_year,
    r.actor_count,
    COALESCE(c.company_count, 0) AS company_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS actor_count
    FROM title t
    LEFT JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year >= (SELECT MAX(production_year) - 10 FROM title)
    GROUP BY t.id
) r
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        t2.title AS joined_title,
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.id) AS company_count
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id, t2.title
) c ON r.movie_title = c.joined_title
WHERE r.actor_count > 2
ORDER BY r.production_year DESC, r.actor_count DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH MovieActorInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        a.name AS actor_name,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        r.role AS actor_role,
        COUNT(DISTINCT kc.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        cast_info ci
    INNER JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
    INNER JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
    INNER JOIN role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN keyword kc ON mk.keyword_id = kc.id
    GROUP BY 
        a.name, t.title, t.production_year, r.role
),

MovieCompanyInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        COMPANY.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM 
        movie_companies mc
    INNER JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
    INNER JOIN company_name COMPANY ON mc.company_id = COMPANY.id
    INNER JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE 
        COMPANY.country_code = 'USA'
),

CombinedInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        mai.actor_name,
        mai.movie_title,
        mai.production_year,
        mai.actor_role,
        mai.keyword_count,
        mci.company_name,
        mci.company_type
    FROM 
        MovieActorInfo mai
    LEFT JOIN MovieCompanyInfo mci ON mai.movie_title = mci.movie_title
)

SELECT 
    actor_name, 
    movie_title, 
    production_year, 
    actor_role, 
    keyword_count, 
    company_name, 
    company_type
FROM 
    CombinedInfo
ORDER BY 
    production_year DESC, 
    actor_name ASC
sql2:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    r.role AS actor_role,

    COMPANY.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type
FROM

INNER JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
INNER JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
INNER JOIN role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN keyword kc ON mk.keyword_id = kc.id

GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, t.production_year, r.role, COMPANY.name, ct.kind

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        k.keyword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS year_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title a
    JOIN 
        title t ON a.movie_id = t.id
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
TopKeywords AS (
    SELECT 
        keyword,
        COUNT(*) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
    WHERE 
        year_rank <= 5
    GROUP BY 
        keyword
    ORDER BY 
        keyword_count DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    m.movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    k.keyword,
    COUNT(ci.id) AS cast_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title m ON ci.movie_id = m.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    RankedMovies r ON m.title = r.movie_title AND m.production_year = r.production_year
WHERE 
    k.keyword IN (SELECT keyword FROM TopKeywords)
GROUP BY 
    a.name, m.movie_title, t.production_year, k.keyword
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(ci.id) DESC, a.name
sql2:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    m.title AS movie_title,
    m.production_year,
    k.keyword,
    COUNT(ci.id) AS cast_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title m ON ci.movie_id = m.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ranked.movie_title, ranked.production_year
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            at.title AS movie_title,
            t.production_year,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS year_rank
        FROM 
            aka_title at
        JOIN title t ON at.movie_id = t.id
        JOIN movie_keyword mk2 ON t.id = mk2.movie_id
        JOIN keyword k2 ON mk2.keyword_id = k2.id
        WHERE t.production_year IS NOT NULL
    ) ranked
    WHERE ranked.year_rank <= 5
) r ON m.title = r.movie_title AND m.production_year = r.production_year
JOIN (
    SELECT sub.keyword
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            k3.keyword,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t2.production_year ORDER BY t2.production_year DESC) AS year_rank
        FROM 
            aka_title at2
        JOIN title t2 ON at2.movie_id = t2.id
        JOIN movie_keyword mk3 ON t2.id = mk3.movie_id
        JOIN keyword k3 ON mk3.keyword_id = k3.id
        WHERE t2.production_year IS NOT NULL
    ) sub
    WHERE sub.year_rank <= 5
    GROUP BY sub.keyword
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 10
) tk ON k.keyword = tk.keyword
GROUP BY 
    a.name, m.title, m.production_year, k.keyword
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(ci.id) DESC, a.name

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        t.kind_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title AS t
    JOIN 
        complete_cast AS cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info AS c ON cc.subject_id = c.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id
),
ActorStats AS (
    SELECT 
        a.person_id,
        a.name,
        COUNT(c.movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        aka_name AS a
    JOIN 
        cast_info AS c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        a.person_id, a.name
),
HighProfileActors AS (
    SELECT 
        name,
        movie_count
    FROM 
        ActorStats
    WHERE 
        movie_count > 5
),
KeywordStats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.id AS movie_id,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        aka_title AS m
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword AS mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        m.id
),
TopKeywords AS (
    SELECT 
        m.title,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS count_keywords
    FROM 
        aka_title AS m
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword AS mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        m.title
    ORDER BY 
        count_keywords DESC
    LIMIT 10
)

SELECT 
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    hm.name AS high_profile_actor,
    tk.title AS top_keyword_title,
    tk.count_keywords
FROM 
    RankedMovies AS rm
JOIN 
    HighProfileActors AS hm ON (hm.movie_count > 5 AND rm.movie_id IN (
        SELECT ci.movie_id
        FROM cast_info AS ci
        JOIN aka_name AS an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
        WHERE an.name = hm.name
    ))
JOIN 
    TopKeywords AS tk ON rm.title = tk.title
WHERE 
    rm.rank = 1
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, tk.count_keywords DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    hm.name AS high_profile_actor,
    tk.title AS top_keyword_title,
    tk.count_keywords
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            t.id AS movie_id,
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            t.kind_id,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC) AS rank
        FROM
            aka_title AS t
        JOIN
            complete_cast AS cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
        JOIN
            cast_info AS c ON cc.subject_id = c.person_id
        GROUP BY
            t.id, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id
    ) AS rm
JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            a.person_id,
            a.name,
            COUNT(c.movie_id) AS movie_count
        FROM
            aka_name AS a
        JOIN
            cast_info AS c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
        GROUP BY
            a.person_id, a.name
        HAVING
            COUNT(c.movie_id) > 5
    ) AS hm ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM cast_info AS ci
        WHERE ci.person_id = hm.person_id
          AND ci.movie_id = rm.movie_id
    )
JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            m.title,
            COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS count_keywords
        FROM
            aka_title AS m
        JOIN
            movie_keyword AS mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
        GROUP BY
            m.title
        ORDER BY
            count_keywords DESC
        LIMIT 10
    ) AS tk ON rm.title = tk.title
WHERE
    rm.rank = 1
ORDER BY
    rm.production_year DESC, tk.count_keywords DESC

sql1:
WITH ActorMovieCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        a.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(ci.movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        aka_name a
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        a.name
),
MostProlificActors AS (
    SELECT 
        actor_name
    FROM 
        ActorMovieCounts
    WHERE 
        movie_count >= (SELECT AVG(movie_count) FROM ActorMovieCounts)
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title, 
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(mc.company_id) AS company_count
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    ORDER BY 
        company_count DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
ActorInTopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.name AS actor_name,
        tm.title AS movie_title,
        tm.production_year
    FROM 
        MostProlificActors ma
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON ma.actor_name = (SELECT name FROM aka_name WHERE person_id = ci.person_id)
    JOIN 
        title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
    JOIN 
        TopMovies tm ON t.title = tm.title
)
SELECT 
    actor_name,
    movie_title,
    production_year
FROM 
    ActorInTopMovies
ORDER BY 
    production_year DESC, actor_name
sql2:
SELECT 
    ma_aka.name AS actor_name,
    tm.title AS movie_title,
    tm.production_year
FROM (
    SELECT amc.actor_name
    FROM (
        SELECT a.name AS actor_name, COUNT(ci.movie_id) AS movie_count
        FROM aka_name a
        JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
        GROUP BY a.name
    ) amc
    WHERE amc.movie_count >= (
        SELECT AVG(amc2.movie_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT a2.name AS actor_name, COUNT(ci2.movie_id) AS movie_count
            FROM aka_name a2
            JOIN cast_info ci2 ON a2.person_id = ci2.person_id
            GROUP BY a2.name
        ) amc2
    )
) ma
JOIN aka_name ma_aka ON ma.actor_name = ma_aka.name
JOIN cast_info ci ON ma_aka.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN (
    SELECT t2.title, t2.production_year, COUNT(mc.company_id) AS company_count
    FROM title t2
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON t2.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t2.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    GROUP BY t2.id, t2.title, t2.production_year
    ORDER BY company_count DESC
    LIMIT 10
) tm ON t.title = tm.title
ORDER BY 
    production_year DESC, actor_name

sql1:
WITH ranked_titles AS (
    SELECT
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        t.kind_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY t.production_year
            ORDER BY t.title
        ) AS title_rank
    FROM
        aka_title t
    WHERE
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
cast_members AS (
    SELECT
        c.movie_id,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        r.role AS role_name
    FROM
        cast_info c
    JOIN
        aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
    JOIN
        role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
),
movie_keywords AS (
    SELECT
        mk.movie_id,
        k.keyword
    FROM
        movie_keyword mk
    JOIN
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
company_movies AS (
    SELECT
        mc.movie_id,
        cn.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN
        company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT
    rt.title,
    rt.production_year,
    cm.actor_name,
    cm.role_name,
    mk.keyword,
    cm.movie_id,
    cm.movie_id AS linked_movie_id
FROM
    ranked_titles rt
JOIN
    cast_members cm ON rt.title_id = cm.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_keywords mk ON cm.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    company_movies com ON cm.movie_id = com.movie_id
WHERE
    rt.title_rank <= 5
    AND mk.keyword IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC,
    rt.title ASC,
    cm.actor_name
sql2:
SELECT
    rt.title,
    rt.production_year,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS role_name,
    k.keyword,
    c.movie_id,

FROM
    (
        SELECT
            t.id AS title_id,

                PARTITION BY t.production_year

            ) AS title_rank
        FROM

    ) rt
JOIN

    movie_keyword mk ON c.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON c.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
WHERE
    rt.title_rank <= 5
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC,
    rt.title ASC,
    a.name

WITH RankedMovies AS (

        mt.id AS movie_id,
        mt.title,
        mt.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count,

        mt.id, mt.title, mt.production_year
),

TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        title,
        production_year
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
    WHERE 
        rank <= 5
),

CastDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        at.title AS movie_title,
        at.production_year,
        cc.note AS cast_note,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ak.person_id ORDER BY at.production_year DESC) AS role_rank
    FROM 
        aka_name ak
    JOIN 
        cast_info cc ON ak.person_id = cc.person_id
    JOIN 
        aka_title at ON cc.movie_id = at.id
    JOIN 
        TopMovies tm ON at.id = tm.movie_id
)

SELECT 
    cd.actor_name,
    cd.movie_title,
    cd.production_year,
    cd.cast_note
FROM 
    CastDetails cd
WHERE 
    cd.role_rank = 1
ORDER BY 
    cd.production_year DESC

SELECT
    sq.actor_name,
    sq.movie_title,
    sq.production_year,
    sq.cast_note
FROM (
    SELECT
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        at.title AS movie_title,
        at.production_year,
        cc.note AS cast_note,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ak.person_id ORDER BY at.production_year DESC) AS role_rank
    FROM
        aka_name ak
    JOIN
        cast_info cc ON ak.person_id = cc.person_id
    JOIN
        aka_title at ON cc.movie_id = at.id
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    mt.id AS movie_id,
                    mt.production_year,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mt.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) DESC) AS rank
                FROM
                    aka_title mt
                JOIN
                    movie_companies mc ON mt.id = mc.movie_id
                GROUP BY
                    mt.id, mt.title, mt.production_year
            ) rm
            WHERE rm.rank <= 5
              AND rm.movie_id = at.id
        )
) sq
WHERE
    sq.role_rank = 1
ORDER BY
    sq.production_year DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title AS movie_title,
        a.production_year,
        k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
        COUNT(c.id) AS cast_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.id ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title a
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON a.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info c ON a.id = c.movie_id
    WHERE 
        a.production_year > 2000 -- Focus on movies produced after 2000
    GROUP BY 
        a.id, a.title, a.production_year, k.keyword
),
FilteredMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        rm.movie_title,
        rm.production_year,
        rm.movie_keyword,
        rm.cast_count
    FROM 
        RankedMovies rm
    WHERE 
        rm.rank = 1 -- Select the top movie for each keyword
),
KeywordStats AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_keyword,
        COUNT(movie_title) AS movie_count,
        AVG(cast_count) AS average_cast_size
    FROM 
        FilteredMovies
    GROUP BY 
        movie_keyword
)
SELECT 
    ks.movie_keyword,
    ks.movie_count,
    ks.average_cast_size
FROM 
    KeywordStats ks
ORDER BY 
    ks.movie_count DESC, ks.average_cast_size DESC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.movie_keyword,
    COUNT(sub.movie_title) AS movie_count,
    AVG(sub.cast_count)    AS average_cast_size
FROM (
    SELECT
        ranked.movie_title,
        ranked.production_year,
        ranked.movie_keyword,
        ranked.cast_count
    FROM (
        SELECT
            a.id           AS aid,
            a.title        AS movie_title,
            a.production_year,
            k.keyword      AS movie_keyword,
            COUNT(c.id)    AS cast_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.id
                               ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC) AS rank
        FROM aka_title a
        LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON a.id = mk.movie_id
        LEFT JOIN keyword k        ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        LEFT JOIN cast_info c      ON a.id = c.movie_id
        WHERE a.production_year > 2000
        GROUP BY a.id, a.title, a.production_year, k.keyword
    ) ranked
    WHERE ranked.rank = 1
) sub
GROUP BY sub.movie_keyword
ORDER BY movie_count DESC, average_cast_size DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY LENGTH(t.title) DESC) AS title_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
TopTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_title,
        production_year
    FROM 
        RankedTitles
    WHERE 
        title_rank <= 5
),
TopActors AS (
    SELECT 
        a.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(ci.movie_id) AS total_movies
    FROM 
        aka_name a
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN 
        TopTitles tt ON ci.movie_id = tt.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        a.name
    ORDER BY 
        total_movies DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
SELECT 
    tt.movie_title,
    tt.production_year,
    ta.actor_name,
    ta.total_movies
FROM 
    TopTitles tt
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON tt.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
JOIN 
    TopActors ta ON an.name = ta.actor_name
ORDER BY 
    tt.production_year DESC, 
    total_movies DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    tt.movie_title,
    tt.production_year,
    ta.actor_name,
    ta.total_movies
FROM 
    (SELECT movie_title, production_year, movie_id
     FROM (
        SELECT 
            t.title AS movie_title,
            t.production_year,
            t.movie_id,
            rank() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY LENGTH(t.title) DESC) AS title_rank
        FROM aka_title t
        WHERE t.production_year IS NOT NULL
     ) RankedTitles
     WHERE title_rank <= 5
    ) tt
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON tt.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        a.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(ci2.movie_id) AS total_movies
     FROM 
        aka_name a
     JOIN 
        cast_info ci2 ON a.person_id = ci2.person_id
     JOIN 
        (SELECT movie_id
         FROM (
            SELECT 
                t2.movie_id,
                rank() OVER (PARTITION BY t2.production_year ORDER BY LENGTH(t2.title) DESC) AS title_rank
            FROM aka_title t2
            WHERE t2.production_year IS NOT NULL
         ) RankedTitles2
         WHERE title_rank <= 5
        ) tt2 ON ci2.movie_id = tt2.movie_id
     GROUP BY a.name
     ORDER BY total_movies DESC
     LIMIT 10
    ) ta ON an.name = ta.actor_name
ORDER BY 
    tt.production_year DESC, 
    ta.total_movies DESC

sql1:
WITH ranked_actors AS (
    SELECT 
        ka.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) AS movie_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        aka_name ka
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON ka.person_id = ci.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        ka.name
),
movies_with_keywords AS (
    SELECT 
        m.title AS movie_title,
        m.production_year, 
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        aka_title m
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        m.title, m.production_year
),
actors_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        ka.name AS actor_name,
        at.title AS movie_title,
        at.production_year
    FROM 
        aka_name ka
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON ka.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN 
        aka_title at ON ci.movie_id = at.id
)
SELECT 
    ra.actor_name, 
    ra.movie_count, 
    mwk.movie_title,
    mwk.production_year,
    mwk.keyword_count
FROM 
    ranked_actors ra
JOIN 
    actors_movies am ON ra.actor_name = am.actor_name
JOIN 
    movies_with_keywords mwk ON am.movie_title = mwk.movie_title 
    AND am.production_year = mwk.production_year
WHERE 
    ra.rn <= 10
ORDER BY 
    ra.movie_count DESC, 
    mwk.keyword_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    ra.actor_name, 
    ra.movie_count, 
    mwk.movie_title,
    mwk.production_year,
    mwk.keyword_count
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            ka.name AS actor_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) AS movie_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ci.movie_id) DESC) AS rn
        FROM 
            aka_name ka
        JOIN 
            cast_info ci ON ka.person_id = ci.person_id
        GROUP BY 
            ka.name
    ) ra
JOIN 
    aka_name ka2 ON ra.actor_name = ka2.name
JOIN 
    cast_info ci2 ON ka2.person_id = ci2.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title at ON ci2.movie_id = at.id
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            m.title AS movie_title,
            m.production_year, 
            COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
        FROM 
            aka_title m
        LEFT JOIN 
            movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
        GROUP BY 
            m.title, m.production_year
    ) mwk ON at.title = mwk.movie_title 
    AND at.production_year = mwk.production_year
WHERE 
    ra.rn <= 10
ORDER BY 
    ra.movie_count DESC, 
    mwk.keyword_count DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title AS movie_title,
        a.production_year,
        k.keyword AS keyword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.id ORDER BY a.production_year DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title a
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON a.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        a.kind_id IN (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'feature')
),
CastDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        c.movie_id,
        p.name AS actor_name,
        r.role AS actor_role
    FROM 
        cast_info c
    JOIN 
        aka_name p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
    JOIN 
        role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
),
CompanyData AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        co.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM 
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN 
        company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT 
    rm.movie_title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.keyword,
    cd.actor_name,
    cd.actor_role,
    cmp.company_name,
    cmp.company_type
FROM 
    RankedMovies rm
LEFT JOIN 
    CastDetails cd ON rm.movie_title = cd.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    CompanyData cmp ON rm.movie_title = cmp.movie_id
WHERE 
    rm.rank = 1
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, rm.movie_title
sql2:
SELECT
    rm.movie_title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.keyword,
    cd.actor_name,
    cd.actor_role,
    cmp.company_name,
    cmp.company_type
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            a.title AS movie_title,
            a.production_year,
            k.keyword AS keyword
        FROM
            aka_title a
        JOIN
            kind_type kt ON a.kind_id = kt.id AND kt.kind = 'feature'
        JOIN
            movie_keyword mk ON a.id = mk.movie_id
        JOIN
            keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        WHERE
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.id ORDER BY a.production_year DESC) = 1
    ) rm
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            c.movie_id,
            p.name AS actor_name,
            r.role AS actor_role
        FROM
            cast_info c
        JOIN
            aka_name p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
        JOIN
            role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
    ) cd ON rm.movie_title = cd.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            mc.movie_id,
            co.name AS company_name,
            ct.kind AS company_type
        FROM
            movie_companies mc
        JOIN
            company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
        JOIN
            company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    ) cmp ON rm.movie_title = cmp.movie_id
ORDER BY
    rm.production_year DESC, rm.movie_title

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        t.kind_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.kind_id ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        title t
    WHERE 
        t.production_year > 2000
),
AkaNames AS (
    SELECT 
        ak.person_id,
        ak.name,
        ak.id AS aka_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        aka_name ak
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        ak.person_id, ak.name, ak.id
),
TopActors AS (
    SELECT 
        an.name,
        an.movie_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY an.movie_count DESC) AS actor_rank
    FROM 
        AkaNames an
    WHERE 
        an.movie_count > 5
),
Keywords AS (
    SELECT 
        k.id AS keyword_id,
        k.keyword
    FROM 
        keyword k
    WHERE 
        k.phonetic_code IS NOT NULL
),
MoviesWithKeywords AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.movie_id, 
        mt.title,
        mk.keyword_id,
        k.keyword
    FROM 
        movie_keyword mk
    JOIN 
        movie_info m ON mk.movie_id = m.movie_id
    JOIN 
        title mt ON mt.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        Keywords k ON mk.keyword_id = k.keyword_id
)
SELECT 
    t.title,
    t.production_year,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    tk.keyword,
    rt.rank AS title_rank
FROM 
    RankedTitles rt
JOIN 
    MoviesWithKeywords tk ON rt.title_id = tk.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = rt.title_id
JOIN 
    TopActors a ON a.name = (SELECT ak.name FROM aka_name ak WHERE ak.person_id = ci.person_id LIMIT 1)
WHERE 
    rt.rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, a.movie_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    rt.title,
    rt.production_year,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    k.keyword,
    rt.rank AS title_rank
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            t.id AS title_id,
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            t.kind_id,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.kind_id ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
        FROM 
            title t
        WHERE 
            t.production_year > 2000
    ) rt
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = rt.title_id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON mk.movie_id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    title mt ON mt.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id AND k.phonetic_code IS NOT NULL
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = rt.title_id
JOIN 
    aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            an.name,
            an.movie_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY an.movie_count DESC) AS actor_rank
        FROM 
            (
                SELECT 
                    ak2.person_id,
                    ak2.name,
                    ak2.id AS aka_id,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT c2.movie_id) AS movie_count
                FROM 
                    aka_name ak2
                JOIN 
                    cast_info c2 ON ak2.person_id = c2.person_id
                GROUP BY 
                    ak2.person_id, ak2.name, ak2.id
            ) an
        WHERE 
            an.movie_count > 5
    ) a ON a.name = ak.name
WHERE 
    rt.rank <= 3
    AND ak.id = (SELECT MIN(ak3.id) FROM aka_name ak3 WHERE ak3.person_id = ci.person_id)
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, a.movie_count DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title, 
        t.production_year, 
        k.keyword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
PersonRoleCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ci.person_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS role_count
    FROM 
        cast_info ci
    GROUP BY 
        ci.person_id
),
TopPersons AS (
    SELECT 
        p.name, 
        prc.role_count
    FROM 
        person_info pi
    JOIN 
        PersonRoleCount prc ON pi.person_id = prc.person_id
    JOIN 
        aka_name p ON pi.person_id = p.person_id
    WHERE 
        prc.role_count > 5
),
CompanyDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        cmp.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type,
        mc.movie_id
    FROM 
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN 
        company_name cmp ON mc.company_id = cmp.id
    JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
),
FinalBenchmark AS (
    SELECT 
        rt.title,
        rt.production_year,
        tp.name AS top_actor,
        cd.company_name,
        cd.company_type,
        rt.keyword,
        rt.rank
    FROM 
        RankedTitles rt
    LEFT JOIN 
        TopPersons tp ON rt.rank = 1  -- Only taking the top rank here
    LEFT JOIN 
        CompanyDetails cd ON rt.production_year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)  -- Example filter
)
SELECT 
    *
FROM 
    FinalBenchmark
WHERE 
    production_year IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    production_year DESC, 
    title

SELECT
    rt.title,
    rt.production_year,
    tp.name AS top_actor,
    cd.company_name,
    cd.company_type,
    rt.keyword,
    rt.rank
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        k.keyword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
    FROM
        aka_title t
    JOIN
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
) rt
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        p.name,
        p.person_id
    FROM
        aka_name p
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM person_info pi
            WHERE pi.person_id = p.person_id
        )
        AND (
            SELECT COUNT(*)
            FROM cast_info ci
            WHERE ci.person_id = p.person_id
        ) > 5
) tp ON rt.rank = 1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        cmp.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type,
        mc.movie_id
    FROM
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN
        company_name cmp ON mc.company_id = cmp.id
    JOIN
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
) cd ON rt.production_year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
WHERE
    rt.production_year IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC,
    rt.title

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
        c.role AS cast_role,
        rn,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.id ORDER BY ca.nr_order) AS rn
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    JOIN 
        cast_info ca ON t.id = ca.movie_id
    JOIN 
        role_type c ON ca.role_id = c.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000 AND
        k.keyword IS NOT NULL
),
MovieRatings AS (
    SELECT 
        r.movie_title,
        r.production_year,
        r.movie_keyword,
        r.cast_role,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY r.movie_title) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        RankedMovies r
)
SELECT 
    m.movie_title,
    m.production_year,
    m.movie_keyword,
    m.cast_role,
    m.keyword_count
FROM 
    MovieRatings m
WHERE 
    m.keyword_count > 1
ORDER BY 
    m.production_year DESC, 
    m.movie_title
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    c.role AS cast_role,
    kc.keyword_count
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    cast_info ca ON t.id = ca.movie_id
JOIN 
    role_type c ON ca.role_id = c.id
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        t2.title AS movie_title,
        COUNT(*) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        title t2
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk2 ON t2.id = mk2.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k2 ON mk2.keyword_id = k2.id
    JOIN 
        cast_info ca2 ON t2.id = ca2.movie_id
    JOIN 
        role_type c2 ON ca2.role_id = c2.id
    WHERE 
        t2.production_year >= 2000 AND
        k2.keyword IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        t2.title
    HAVING 
        COUNT(*) > 1
) kc ON t.title = kc.movie_title
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 AND
    k.keyword IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    t.title

sql1:
WITH ranked_titles AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS title_id, 
        t.title, 
        t.production_year, 
        k.keyword, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.id ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
popular_names AS (
    SELECT 
        a.name AS aka_name, 
        COUNT(c.movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        aka_name a
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        a.name
    HAVING 
        COUNT(c.movie_id) > 5
),
company_details AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id AS company_id, 
        c.name AS company_name, 
        ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM 
        company_name c
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON c.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT 
    rt.title_id, 
    rt.title, 
    rt.production_year, 
    pn.aka_name, 
    pn.movie_count, 
    cd.company_name, 
    cd.company_type
FROM 
    ranked_titles rt
LEFT JOIN 
    popular_names pn ON rt.title_id = pn.movie_count
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON rt.title_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_details cd ON mc.company_id = cd.company_id
WHERE 
    rt.rank = 1 AND 
    rt.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, 
    pn.movie_count DESC

        SELECT 
            a.name AS aka_name, 
            COUNT(c.movie_id) AS movie_count
        FROM 
            aka_name a
        JOIN 
            cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
        GROUP BY 
            a.name
        HAVING 
            COUNT(c.movie_id) > 5
    ) pn ON rt.title_id = pn.movie_count
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON rt.title_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.id AS company_id, 
            c.name AS company_name, 
            ct.kind AS company_type
        FROM 
            company_name c
        JOIN 
            movie_companies mc2 ON c.id = mc2.company_id
        JOIN 
            company_type ct ON mc2.company_type_id = ct.id
    ) cd ON mc.company_id = cd.company_id
WHERE 
    rt.rank = 1 AND 
    rt.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, 
    pn.movie_count DESC
LIMIT 50

sql1:
WITH MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        c.kind AS role
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
    JOIN 
        aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
    JOIN 
        role_type c ON ci.role_id = c.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000
),
KeywordCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        md.movie_title,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        MovieDetails md
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON md.movie_title = mk.movie_id::text
    GROUP BY 
        md.movie_title
),
CompanyInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        cn.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT 
    md.movie_title,
    md.production_year,
    md.actor_name,
    md.role,
    kc.keyword_count,
    ci.company_name,
    ci.company_type
FROM 
    MovieDetails md
LEFT JOIN 
    KeywordCounts kc ON md.movie_title = kc.movie_title
LEFT JOIN 
    CompanyInfo ci ON md.movie_title = ci.movie_title
WHERE 
    kc.keyword_count > 3 
ORDER BY 
    md.production_year DESC, 
    kc.keyword_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    md.movie_title,
    md.production_year,
    md.actor_name,
    md.role,
    kc.keyword_count,
    ci.company_name,
    ci.company_type
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        c.kind AS role
     FROM 
        title t
     JOIN cast_info cas ON t.id = cas.movie_id
     JOIN aka_name a ON cas.person_id = a.person_id
     JOIN role_type c ON cas.role_id = c.id
     WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000
    ) md
INNER JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        sub.movie_title,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
     FROM 
        (SELECT DISTINCT t.title AS movie_title
         FROM title t
         JOIN cast_info cas ON t.id = cas.movie_id
         JOIN aka_name a ON cas.person_id = a.person_id
         JOIN role_type c ON cas.role_id = c.id
         WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
        ) sub
     LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON sub.movie_title = mk.movie_id::text
     GROUP BY sub.movie_title
     HAVING COUNT(mk.keyword_id) > 3
    ) kc ON md.movie_title = kc.movie_title
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        cn.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type
     FROM 
        title t
     JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
     JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
     JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    ) ci ON md.movie_title = ci.movie_title
ORDER BY 
    md.production_year DESC, 
    kc.keyword_count DESC

sql1:
WITH ranked_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT m.company_id) AS production_company_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        aka_title AS t
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_companies AS m ON t.id = m.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword AS mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    WHERE 
        t.kind_id IN (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
),
top_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        rm.movie_id,
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year,
        rm.production_company_count + rm.keyword_count AS total_score,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (rm.production_company_count + rm.keyword_count) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ranked_movies AS rm
    WHERE 
        rm.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
)
SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    pm.name AS director_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_count
FROM 
    top_movies AS tm
JOIN 
    complete_cast AS cc ON tm.movie_id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info AS ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id 
JOIN 
    aka_name AS an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies AS mc ON tm.movie_id = mc.movie_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    company_type AS ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id 
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info AS pi ON ci.person_id = pi.person_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    role_type AS rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id 
WHERE 
    pi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Director') 
GROUP BY 
    tm.movie_id, tm.title, tm.production_year, pm.name, ct.kind 
ORDER BY 
    tm.rank
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    pm.name AS director_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_count
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            rm.movie_id,
            rm.title,
            rm.production_year,
            rm.production_company_count + rm.keyword_count AS total_score,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (rm.production_company_count + rm.keyword_count) DESC) AS rank
        FROM
            (
                SELECT
                    t.id AS movie_id,
                    t.title,
                    t.production_year,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT m.company_id) AS production_company_count,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
                FROM
                    aka_title AS t
                INNER JOIN
                    kind_type AS kt ON t.kind_id = kt.id AND kt.kind = 'movie'
                LEFT JOIN
                    movie_companies AS m ON t.id = m.movie_id
                LEFT JOIN
                    movie_keyword AS mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
                GROUP BY
                    t.id, t.title, t.production_year
            ) AS rm
        WHERE
            rm.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
    ) AS tm
JOIN
    complete_cast AS cc ON tm.movie_id = cc.movie_id
JOIN
    cast_info AS ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    aka_name AS an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_companies AS mc ON tm.movie_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    company_type AS ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN
    person_info AS pi ON ci.person_id = pi.person_id
LEFT JOIN
    role_type AS rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
JOIN
    info_type AS it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Director'
GROUP BY
    tm.movie_id, tm.title, tm.production_year, pm.name, ct.kind
ORDER BY
    tm.rank
LIMIT 10

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title AS movie_title,
        a.production_year,
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        ak.id AS actor_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.id ORDER BY ak.name) AS actor_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title a
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON a.id = c.movie_id
    JOIN 
        aka_name ak ON c.person_id = ak.person_id
    WHERE 
        a.production_year >= 2000
),
ActorMovieCount AS (
    SELECT 
        actor_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT movie_title) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
    GROUP BY 
        actor_id
),
TopActors AS (
    SELECT 
        actor_id,
        movie_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY movie_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ActorMovieCount
    WHERE
        movie_count > 5
)
SELECT 
    ak.name AS actor_name,
    amc.movie_count,
    tm.movie_title,
    tm.production_year
FROM 
    TopActors ta
JOIN 
    ActorMovieCount amc ON ta.actor_id = amc.actor_id
JOIN 
    RankedMovies tm ON amc.actor_id = tm.actor_id
WHERE 
    ta.rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    amc.movie_count DESC, tm.production_year DESC

    movie_title,
    production_year
FROM (
    SELECT
        tm.actor_name,
        ac.movie_count,
        tm.movie_title,
        tm.production_year,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ac.movie_count DESC) AS rnk
    FROM (
        SELECT
            ak.id AS actor_id,
            COUNT(DISTINCT a.title) AS movie_count
        FROM
            aka_title a
        JOIN cast_info c ON a.id = c.movie_id
        JOIN aka_name ak ON c.person_id = ak.person_id
