        movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    LEFT JOIN
        person_info pi ON c.person_id = pi.person_id
    GROUP BY
        t.id
)

SELECT
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.cast_count,
    COALESCE(rm.avg_rating, 0) AS avg_rating,
    CASE 
        WHEN rm.cast_count > 10 THEN 'Large Cast'
        WHEN rm.cast_count BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'Medium Cast'
        ELSE 'Small Cast'
    END AS cast_size_category
FROM
    RankedMovies rm
WHERE
    rm.rank <= 5
ORDER BY
    rm.production_year DESC, rm.cast_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.cast_count,
    COALESCE(sub.avg_rating, 0) AS avg_rating,
    CASE
        WHEN sub.cast_count > 10 THEN 'Large Cast'
        WHEN sub.cast_count BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'Medium Cast'
        ELSE 'Small Cast'
    END AS cast_size_category
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count,
        AVG(pi.info::NUMERIC) AS avg_rating,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM
        title t
    LEFT JOIN complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    LEFT JOIN info_type it ON it.info = 'rating'
    LEFT JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = it.id
    LEFT JOIN person_info pi ON c.person_id = pi.person_id
    GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.production_year
) sub
WHERE sub.rank <= 5

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'Total' AS title,
    NULL AS production_year,
    SUM(base.cast_count) AS cast_count,
    NULL AS avg_rating,
    NULL AS cast_size_category
FROM (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
    FROM
        title t
    LEFT JOIN complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    GROUP BY t.id
) base

ORDER BY
    production_year DESC NULLS LAST, cast_count DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id as title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) as rn
    FROM 
        title t
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
ActorStats AS (
    SELECT 
        ak.person_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) as movie_count,
        AVG(m.produced_years_diff) as avg_years_diff
    FROM 
        aka_name ak
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT 
            title.id, 
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - title.production_year as produced_years_diff
        FROM 
            title
    ) m ON c.movie_id = m.id
    GROUP BY 
        ak.person_id
),
BestPerformingActors AS (
    SELECT 
        a.person_id,
        a.movie_count,
        a.avg_years_diff,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY a.movie_count DESC, a.avg_years_diff ASC) as actor_rank
    FROM 
        ActorStats a
)
SELECT 
    ak.name,
    t.title,
    t.production_year,
    CASE 
        WHEN b.actor_rank <= 10 THEN 'Top 10 Actor'
        ELSE 'Other Actor'
    END as actor_category,
    COALESCE(n.name, 'Unknown') as nickname
FROM 
    BestPerformingActors b
JOIN 
    aka_name ak ON b.person_id = ak.person_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id 
LEFT JOIN 
    name n ON ak.id = n.imdb_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year IS NOT NULL
    AND b.movie_count > 5
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    actor_category, 
    ak.name
sql2:
SELECT 
    ak.name,
    t.title,
    t.production_year,
    CASE 
        WHEN RANK() OVER (ORDER BY actor_stats.movie_count DESC, actor_stats.avg_years_diff ASC) <= 10 THEN 'Top 10 Actor'
        ELSE 'Other Actor'
    END as actor_category,
    COALESCE(n.name, 'Unknown') as nickname
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            ak2.person_id,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c2.movie_id) as movie_count,
            AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - t2.production_year) as avg_years_diff
        FROM 
            aka_name ak2
        JOIN 
            cast_info c2 ON ak2.person_id = c2.person_id
        JOIN 
            title t2 ON c2.movie_id = t2.id
        GROUP BY 
            ak2.person_id
        HAVING 
            COUNT(DISTINCT c2.movie_id) > 5
    ) actor_stats
JOIN 
    aka_name ak ON actor_stats.person_id = ak.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN 
    name n ON ak.id = n.imdb_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    actor_category, 
    ak.name

sql1:
WITH ranked_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title,
        a.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year ORDER BY a.production_year DESC) AS rank_by_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
    FROM 
        aka_title a 
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON a.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    WHERE 
        a.production_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        a.title, a.production_year
),
keyword_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        m.movie_id,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword mk 
    JOIN 
        aka_title m ON mk.movie_id = m.id
    GROUP BY 
        m.movie_id
),
filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year,
        rm.cast_count,
        kc.keyword_count,
        CASE 
            WHEN rm.cast_count > 5 AND kc.keyword_count > 3 THEN 'Popular'
            WHEN rm.cast_count <= 5 AND kc.keyword_count <= 3 THEN 'Indie'
            ELSE 'Average'
        END AS movie_category
    FROM 
        ranked_movies rm
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword_counts kc ON rm.title = kc.movie_id
    WHERE 
        rm.rank_by_year <= 5
)
SELECT 
    fm.title,
    fm.production_year,
    fm.cast_count,
    fm.keyword_count,
    fm.movie_category
FROM 
    filtered_movies fm
ORDER BY 
    fm.production_year DESC, 
    fm.cast_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    fm.title,
    fm.production_year,
    fm.cast_count,
    fm.keyword_count,
    fm.movie_category
FROM (
    SELECT
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year,
        rm.cast_count,
        kc.keyword_count,
        CASE
            WHEN rm.cast_count > 5 AND kc.keyword_count > 3 THEN 'Popular'
            WHEN rm.cast_count <= 5 AND kc.keyword_count <= 3 THEN 'Indie'
            ELSE 'Average'
        END AS movie_category
    FROM (
        SELECT
            a.title,
            a.production_year,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year ORDER BY a.production_year DESC) AS rank_by_year,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
        FROM
            aka_title a
        JOIN
            complete_cast cc ON a.id = cc.movie_id
        JOIN
            cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
        WHERE
            a.production_year IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY
            a.title, a.production_year
    ) rm
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            m.movie_id,
            COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
        FROM
            movie_keyword mk
        JOIN
            aka_title m ON mk.movie_id = m.id
        GROUP BY
            m.movie_id
    ) kc ON rm.title = kc.movie_id
    WHERE
        rm.rank_by_year <= 5
) fm
ORDER BY
    fm.production_year DESC,
    fm.cast_count DESC

sql1:
WITH MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        c.name AS company_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS cast_count,
        AVG(CASE WHEN p.info_type_id = 1 THEN LENGTH(p.info) ELSE NULL END) AS average_character_length
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ca ON cc.subject_id = ca.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        person_info p ON ca.person_id = p.person_id AND p.info_type_id IN (1, 2)
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year, c.name
), RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        md.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY md.production_year ORDER BY md.cast_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        MovieDetails md
)
SELECT 
    r.movie_id,
    r.title,
    r.production_year,
    r.company_name,
    r.cast_count,
    r.average_character_length
FROM 
    RankedMovies r
WHERE 
    r.rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    r.production_year DESC, r.cast_count DESC

WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        title t
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
        AND t.title IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
),
KeywordCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        mk.movie_id,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword mk
    GROUP BY 
        mk.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.cast_count,
    COALESCE(kc.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    RankedMovies rm
LEFT JOIN 
    KeywordCounts kc ON rm.title = (SELECT title FROM title WHERE id = kc.movie_id)
WHERE 
    rm.rn <= 5
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, rm.cast_count DESC

SELECT

FROM

            COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_count,

        FROM

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(ci.id) AS cast_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(ci.id) DESC) AS rank_within_year
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        t.title, t.production_year
)

SELECT 
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(rm.cast_count, 0), 'No cast information') AS cast_count,
    ak.name AS actor_name,
    ak.imdb_index AS actor_imdb_index
FROM 
    RankedMovies rm
LEFT JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON rm.title = (SELECT t.title FROM aka_title t WHERE t.id = ci.movie_id)
LEFT JOIN 
    aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
WHERE 
    rm.rank_within_year <= 5
    AND rm.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, rm.cast_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(rm.cast_count, 0), 'No cast information') AS cast_count,
    ak.name AS actor_name,
    ak.imdb_index AS actor_imdb_index
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            COUNT(ci.id) AS cast_count,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(ci.id) DESC) AS rank_within_year
        FROM
            aka_title t
        JOIN
            complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
        JOIN
            cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
        GROUP BY
            t.title, t.production_year
    ) rm
LEFT JOIN
    aka_title at2 ON rm.title = at2.title
LEFT JOIN
    cast_info ci ON at2.id = ci.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
WHERE
    rm.rank_within_year <= 5
    AND rm.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY
    rm.production_year DESC, rm.cast_count DESC

SELECT

    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    cc.kind AS cast_type,
    ci.info AS company_info,
    mk.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type cc ON mc.company_type_id = cc.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON it.id = mc.company_type_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
WHERE 
    a.name IS NOT NULL 
    AND t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name

filtered_actors AS (

),
company_join AS (

    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN comp_cast_type cc ON mc.company_type_id = cc.id
    JOIN info_type it ON it.id = mc.company_type_id
)
SELECT 
    fa.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,

    cj.cast_type,

FROM

JOIN 
    company_join cj ON cj.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = ft.id
LEFT JOIN

ORDER BY

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title,
        a.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year ORDER BY a.production_year DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        aka_title a
    WHERE 
        a.production_year IS NOT NULL
), MovieStats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.title,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cc.person_id) AS cast_count,
        AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - m.production_year) AS avg_age
    FROM 
        title m
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON m.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        k.keyword LIKE 'Drama%'
    GROUP BY 
        m.id, m.title
), PopularityRank AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.title,
        ms.cast_count,
        ms.avg_age,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ms.cast_count DESC) AS popularity_rank
    FROM 
        MovieStats ms
)

SELECT 
    p.id AS person_id,
    p.name,
    mr.title,
    mr.production_year,
    pr.popularity_rank,
    COALESCE(mr.cast_count, 0) AS total_cast,
    CASE 
        WHEN pr.popularity_rank < 10 THEN 'Highly Popular'
        WHEN pr.popularity_rank BETWEEN 10 AND 30 THEN 'Moderately Popular'
        ELSE 'Less Popular'
    END AS popularity_category
FROM 
    aka_name p
LEFT JOIN 
    cast_info c ON p.person_id = c.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    PopularityRank pr ON c.movie_id = pr.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedMovies mr ON pr.title = mr.title
WHERE 
    pr.popularity_rank IS NOT NULL
    AND p.name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    pr.popularity_rank, mr.production_year DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    p.id AS person_id,
    p.name,
    mr.title,
    mr.production_year,
    pr.popularity_rank,
    COALESCE(mr.cast_count, 0) AS total_cast,
    CASE
        WHEN pr.popularity_rank < 10 THEN 'Highly Popular'
        WHEN pr.popularity_rank BETWEEN 10 AND 30 THEN 'Moderately Popular'
        ELSE 'Less Popular'
    END AS popularity_category
FROM
    aka_name p
LEFT JOIN
    cast_info c ON p.person_id = c.person_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ms.title,
        ms.cast_count,
        ms.avg_age,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ms.cast_count DESC) AS popularity_rank,
        ms.movie_id
    FROM (
        SELECT
            m.id AS movie_id,
            m.title,
            COUNT(DISTINCT cc.person_id) AS cast_count,
            AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - m.production_year) AS avg_age
        FROM
            title m
        INNER JOIN
            movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
        INNER JOIN
            keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        LEFT JOIN
            complete_cast cc ON m.id = cc.movie_id
        WHERE
            k.keyword LIKE 'Drama%'
        GROUP BY
            m.id, m.title
    ) ms
) pr ON c.movie_id = pr.movie_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        a.title,
        a.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year ORDER BY a.production_year DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        aka_title a
    WHERE
        a.production_year IS NOT NULL
) mr ON pr.title = mr.title
WHERE
    pr.popularity_rank IS NOT NULL
    AND p.name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    pr.popularity_rank, mr.production_year DESC

    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rm.title AS movie_title,
    rm.production_year,
    mc.company_type,
    tk.movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    recent_movies rm
JOIN 
    thriller_keywords tk ON rm.id = tk.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_comp mc ON rm.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON rm.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, a.name ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT

    m.title AS movie_title,
    c.role_id,
    r.role AS role_name,
    c.nr_order,
    ci.kind AS comp_cast_type_name,
    co.name AS company_name,

FROM

JOIN

JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type ci ON c.person_role_id = ci.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON m.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE

AND

    c.nr_order ASC
sql2:
WITH filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
filtered_persons AS (
    SELECT id, name
    FROM name
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
movie_cast AS (
    SELECT c.person_id, c.movie_id, c.role_id, c.person_role_id, c.nr_order
    FROM cast_info c
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_movies fm WHERE fm.id = c.movie_id)
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_persons fp WHERE fp.id = c.person_id)
)
SELECT 
    fp.name AS person_name,
    fm.title AS movie_title,
    mc2.role_id,
    r.role AS role_name,
    mc2.nr_order,
    ci.kind AS comp_cast_type_name,
    co.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mi.info AS movie_info,
    fm.production_year
FROM 
    movie_cast mc2
INNER JOIN filtered_persons fp ON fp.id = mc2.person_id
INNER JOIN filtered_movies fm ON fm.id = mc2.movie_id
INNER JOIN complete_cast cc ON fm.id = cc.movie_id
INNER JOIN movie_companies mco ON fm.id = mco.movie_id
INNER JOIN company_name co ON mco.company_id = co.id
INNER JOIN comp_cast_type ci ON mc2.person_role_id = ci.id
LEFT JOIN role_type r ON mc2.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON fm.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN movie_info mi ON fm.id = mi.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    fm.production_year DESC, 
    mc2.nr_order ASC

SELECT a.name AS actor_name,

JOIN title_keywords tk ON ft.id = tk.movie_id
JOIN comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY ft.production_year DESC, a.name ASC

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    p.info AS actor_info,

JOIN

JOIN

JOIN

JOIN 
    role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
JOIN

JOIN

JOIN

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
filtered_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, comp.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name comp ON mc.company_id = comp.id
    WHERE comp.country_code = 'USA'
),
filtered_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
)
SELECT
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    p.info AS actor_info,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    fk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    fc.name AS production_company,

FROM

JOIN
    cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
JOIN
    filtered_keywords fk ON ft.id = fk.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_info ti ON ft.id = ti.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    a.name ASC

sql1:
WITH Recursive_Cast_Info AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id AS cast_id,
        c.person_id,
        c.movie_id,
        c.note AS cast_note,
        c.nr_order,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        ct.kind AS cast_type,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.movie_id ORDER BY c.nr_order) AS actor_order
    FROM 
        cast_info c
    JOIN 
        aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
    JOIN 
        aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
    JOIN 
        comp_cast_type ct ON c.person_role_id = ct.id
    WHERE 
        c.nr_order IS NOT NULL
),
Movie_Statistics AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS total_actors,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN actor_order = 1 THEN person_id END) AS lead_actors,
        AVG(year_diff) AS avg_year_diff
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            movie_id,
            person_id,
            actor_order,
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - production_year AS year_diff
        FROM 
            Recursive_Cast_Info
        JOIN 
            title t ON Recursive_Cast_Info.movie_id = t.id
    ) AS Year_Table
    GROUP BY 
        movie_id
)
SELECT 
    m.id AS movie_id,
    m.title,
    ms.total_actors,
    ms.lead_actors,
    ms.avg_year_diff
FROM 
    title m
JOIN 
    Movie_Statistics ms ON m.id = ms.movie_id
WHERE 
    ms.total_actors > 5
ORDER BY 
    ms.avg_year_diff DESC, 
    m.title
sql2:
SELECT 
    m.id AS movie_id,
    m.title,
    sub.total_actors,
    sub.lead_actors,
    sub.avg_year_diff
FROM 
    title m
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        yt.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT yt.person_id) AS total_actors,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN yt.actor_order = 1 THEN yt.person_id END) AS lead_actors,
        AVG(yt.year_diff) AS avg_year_diff
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            ci.movie_id,
            ci.person_id,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ci.movie_id ORDER BY ci.nr_order) AS actor_order,
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - at.production_year AS year_diff
        FROM 
            cast_info ci
        JOIN aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
        JOIN aka_title at ON ci.movie_id = at.movie_id
        JOIN comp_cast_type cct ON ci.person_role_id = cct.id
        JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
        WHERE 
            ci.nr_order IS NOT NULL
    ) yt
    GROUP BY 
        yt.movie_id
    HAVING 
        COUNT(DISTINCT yt.person_id) > 5
) sub ON m.id = sub.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    sub.avg_year_diff DESC, 
    m.title

    WHERE EXISTS (

    )

filtered_titles AS (

    filtered_titles ft ON c.movie_id = ft.id

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.kind AS cast_type, 
    p.info AS person_info, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword 
FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON cn.imdb_id = cc.subject_id 
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id 
JOIN 
    info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id 
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id 
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND a.name LIKE 'A%' 
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name
sql2:
WITH filtered_aka AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name LIKE 'A%'
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
cast_roles AS (
    SELECT ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_role_id, ci.role_id
    FROM cast_info ci
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_aka fa WHERE fa.person_id = ci.person_id)
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_titles ft WHERE ft.id = ci.movie_id)
)
SELECT
    fa.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    cast_roles cr
JOIN filtered_aka fa ON cr.person_id = fa.person_id
JOIN filtered_titles ft ON cr.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN company_name cn ON cn.imdb_id = cc.subject_id
JOIN movie_info mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN role_type r ON cr.role_id = r.id
JOIN comp_cast_type c ON cr.person_role_id = c.id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    fa.name

sql1:
SELECT t.title, a.name AS actor_name, c.kind AS role_type, m.name AS company_name, 
       m.year AS production_year, COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
FROM title t
JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN role_type c ON ci.role_id = c.id
JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE t.production_year >= 2000 
  AND c.kind IS NOT NULL 
  AND m.country_code IN ('USA', 'UK', 'CA')  
GROUP BY t.id, a.name, c.kind, m.name, m.production_year
ORDER BY keyword_count DESC, t.title ASC
LIMIT 100
sql2:
WITH kw_counts AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    GROUP BY mk.movie_id
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
)
SELECT ft.title, a.name AS actor_name, c.kind AS role_type, m.name AS company_name,
       m.year AS production_year, COALESCE(kc.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count
FROM filtered_titles ft
JOIN cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN role_type c ON ci.role_id = c.id AND c.kind IS NOT NULL
JOIN movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id AND m.country_code IN ('USA', 'UK', 'CA')
LEFT JOIN kw_counts kc ON ft.id = kc.movie_id
GROUP BY ft.id, a.name, c.kind, m.name, m.production_year, kc.keyword_count
ORDER BY keyword_count DESC, ft.title ASC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title,
        a.production_year,
        c.name AS company_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS actor_count,
        AVG(CASE WHEN ca.note IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS has_note,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title a
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON a.id = mc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON a.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ca ON cc.subject_id = ca.id
    WHERE 
        a.kind_id IN (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind LIKE '%movie%')
        AND a.production_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        a.title, a.production_year, c.name
),
FilteredMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        title,
        production_year,
        company_name,
        actor_count,
        has_note,
        rank
    FROM 
        MovieDetails
    WHERE 
        actor_count > 5
)

SELECT 
    title,
    production_year,
    company_name,
    actor_count,
    has_note
FROM 
    FilteredMovies
WHERE 
    rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    production_year ASC,
    actor_count DESC
sql2:
SELECT
    title,
    production_year,
    company_name,
    actor_count,
    has_note
FROM (
    SELECT
        a.title,
        a.production_year,
        c.name AS company_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS actor_count,
        AVG(CASE WHEN ca.note IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS has_note,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM
        aka_title a
    LEFT JOIN
        movie_companies mc ON a.id = mc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    LEFT JOIN
        complete_cast cc ON a.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN
        cast_info ca ON cc.subject_id = ca.id
    WHERE
        EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM kind_type kt WHERE kt.id = a.kind_id AND kt.kind LIKE '%movie%')
        AND a.production_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        a.title, a.production_year, c.name
    HAVING
        COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) > 5
) sub
WHERE
    rank <= 10
ORDER BY
    production_year ASC,
    actor_count DESC

SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_id, 
    a.name AS alias_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.note AS cast_note, 
    p.info AS person_info, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000 
    AND c.nr_order < 5
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
filtered_cast AS (
    SELECT person_id, movie_id, note
    FROM cast_info
    WHERE nr_order < 5
),
cast_titles AS (
    SELECT fc.person_id, ft.title, ft.production_year, fc.note AS cast_note
    FROM filtered_cast fc
    JOIN filtered_titles ft ON fc.movie_id = ft.id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS alias_name,
    ct.title AS movie_title,
    ct.cast_note AS cast_note,
    p.info AS person_info,
    tk.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_titles ct ON a.person_id = ct.person_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_titles ft2 ON ct.title = ft2.title AND ct.production_year = ft2.production_year
JOIN
    title_keywords tk ON ft2.id = tk.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ct.production_year DESC,
    a.name

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS character_role,
    co.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 AND 
    k.keyword LIKE '%action%' AND 
    mi.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Box Office')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS total_cast,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM title t
    LEFT JOIN cast_info c ON t.id = c.movie_id
    GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.production_year
),
HighlyRatedMovies AS (
    SELECT
        m.id AS movie_id,
        m.title,
        m.production_year,
        COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(rating), 2), 0) AS avg_rating
    FROM 
        title m
    LEFT JOIN movie_info mi ON m.id = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    GROUP BY m.id, m.title, m.production_year
    HAVING COUNT(mi.id) > 0
)
SELECT 
    r.title,
    r.production_year,
    r.total_cast,
    h.avg_rating
FROM RankedMovies r
INNER JOIN HighlyRatedMovies h ON r.title_id = h.movie_id
WHERE r.rank <= 5
ORDER BY h.avg_rating DESC, r.total_cast ASC
LIMIT 10
sql2:
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
        r.title,
        r.production_year,
        r.total_cast,
        h.avg_rating
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t.id AS title_id,
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS total_cast,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) DESC) AS rank
        FROM title t
        LEFT JOIN cast_info c ON t.id = c.movie_id
        GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    ) r
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT
            m.id AS movie_id,
            m.title,
            m.production_year,
            COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(rating), 2), 0) AS avg_rating
        FROM title m
        INNER JOIN movie_info mi ON m.id = mi.movie_id
        INNER JOIN info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'rating'
        GROUP BY m.id, m.title, m.production_year
    ) h ON r.title_id = h.movie_id
    WHERE r.rank <= 5
    ORDER BY h.avg_rating DESC, r.total_cast ASC
    LIMIT 10
) part1

UNION ALL

SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COALESCE(cc.total_cast, 0) AS total_cast,
        NULL AS avg_rating
    FROM title t
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT mk.movie_id
        FROM movie_keyword mk
        INNER JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
    ) ak ON ak.movie_id = t.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT movie_id, COUNT(*) AS total_cast
        FROM cast_info
        GROUP BY movie_id
    ) cc ON cc.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE t.production_year IS NULL
    ORDER BY total_cast DESC
    LIMIT 5
) part2

    a.name AS actor_name,
    filtered_titles.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    usa_companies.name AS production_company,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    (SELECT id, title, production_year FROM title WHERE production_year >= 2000) filtered_titles
JOIN
    (SELECT person_id, movie_id, nr_order, role_id FROM cast_info WHERE nr_order <= 3) ci
        ON ci.movie_id = filtered_titles.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id

    movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = filtered_titles.id

    (SELECT id, name FROM company_name WHERE country_code = 'USA') usa_companies
        ON usa_companies.id = mc.company_id

ORDER BY

       t.title AS movie_title,
       c.kind AS company_type,
       COUNT(mi.id) AS info_count

JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE t.production_year > 2000
  AND c.kind = 'Distributor'
GROUP BY a.name, t.title, c.kind
ORDER BY info_count DESC, a.name ASC

sql2:
WITH distributor_movies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id
    FROM movie_companies mc
    WHERE mc.company_type_id IN (
        SELECT c.id FROM company_type c WHERE c.kind = 'Distributor'
    )
),
recent_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM distributor_movies dm WHERE dm.movie_id = t.id)
),
info_counts AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, COUNT(mi.id) AS info_count
    FROM movie_info mi
    INNER JOIN recent_titles rt ON mi.movie_id = rt.id
    GROUP BY mi.movie_id
)
SELECT a.name AS actor_name,
       rt.title AS movie_title,
       'Distributor' AS company_type,
       COALESCE(ic.info_count, 0) AS info_count
FROM aka_name a
JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN recent_titles rt ON ci.movie_id = rt.id
LEFT JOIN info_counts ic ON rt.id = ic.movie_id
GROUP BY a.name, rt.title, ic.info_count
ORDER BY info_count DESC, a.name ASC
LIMIT 100

    ak.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    p.info AS person_info,
    comp.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name ak
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON ak.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name comp ON m.company_id = comp.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND ak.name IS NOT NULL
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'biography')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, c.nr_order ASC

SELECT

WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
filtered_actors AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name IS NOT NULL
),
us_companies AS (
    SELECT id, kind
    FROM company_name
    WHERE country_code = 'USA'
),
birth_info AS (
    SELECT pi.person_id, pi.info AS person_info
    FROM person_info pi
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM info_type it
        WHERE it.id = pi.info_type_id AND it.info = 'birth date'
    )
)
SELECT
    fa.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    uc.kind AS company_kind,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    bi.person_info AS person_info
FROM
    filtered_actors fa
JOIN
    birth_info bi ON fa.person_id = bi.person_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON fa.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN
    us_companies uc ON mc.company_id = uc.id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    fa.name ASC

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    c.kind AS company_type, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    ii.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ii ON mi.info_type_id = ii.id
WHERE 
    ii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Awards')
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC, 
    k.keyword ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH awarded_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
movie_cast AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_inf AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ii.info AS movie_info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ii ON mi.info_type_id = ii.id
    WHERE ii.info = 'Awards'
)
SELECT
    am.title AS movie_title,
    mc2.actor_name,
    mco.company_type,
    mkw.movie_keyword,
    mi2.movie_info
FROM
    awarded_movies am
JOIN movie_cast mc2 ON am.id = mc2.movie_id
JOIN movie_comp mco ON am.id = mco.movie_id
JOIN movie_kw mkw ON am.id = mkw.movie_id
JOIN movie_inf mi2 ON am.id = mi2.movie_id
ORDER BY
    am.production_year DESC,
    mc2.actor_name ASC,
    mkw.movie_keyword ASC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH movie_years AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    GROUP BY 
        t.id
),
top_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id, 
        title, 
        production_year,
        CAST(cast_count AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - production_year + 1), 0) AS avg_cast_per_year
    FROM 
        movie_years
    WHERE 
        production_year IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY 
        avg_cast_per_year DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
keyword_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        mk.movie_id,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword mk
    GROUP BY 
        mk.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    COALESCE(kc.keyword_count, 0) AS total_keywords,
    COALESCE(cc.cast_count, 0) AS total_cast,
    CASE 
        WHEN tm.production_year < 2000 THEN 'Classic'
        WHEN tm.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010 THEN 'Modern'
        ELSE 'Recent'
    END AS era
FROM 
    top_movies tm
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword_counts kc ON tm.movie_id = kc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_years cc ON tm.movie_id = cc.movie_id
WHERE 
    COALESCE(cc.cast_count, 0) > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_keywords DESC,
    total_cast DESC
sql2:
SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(mk.keyword_id) FROM movie_keyword mk WHERE mk.movie_id = tm.movie_id), 0) AS total_keywords,
    tm.cast_count AS total_cast,
    CASE 
        WHEN tm.production_year < 2000 THEN 'Classic'
        WHEN tm.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010 THEN 'Modern'
        ELSE 'Recent'
    END AS era
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            t.id AS movie_id,
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
        FROM 
            aka_title t
        LEFT JOIN 
            complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
        WHERE
            t.production_year IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY 
            t.id
        ORDER BY 
            CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - t.production_year + 1), 0) DESC
        LIMIT 10
    ) tm
WHERE
    tm.cast_count > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_keywords DESC,
    total_cast DESC

SELECT

    c.kind AS role_type,

FROM

JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    role_type c ON ci.role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON ci.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name mci ON mc.company_id = mci.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON ci.movie_id = mi.movie_id
WHERE

    AND mc.company_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'Distributor')
ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
distributor_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, mc.company_id
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE ct.kind = 'Distributor'
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS role_type,
    mci.name AS company_name,
    ft.production_year AS production_year
FROM
    cast_info ci
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.movie_id
JOIN
    role_type c ON ci.role_id = c.id
JOIN
    distributor_companies dc ON ci.movie_id = dc.movie_id
JOIN
    company_name mci ON dc.company_id = mci.id
JOIN
    movie_info mi ON ci.movie_id = mi.movie_id
ORDER BY
    a.name, ft.production_year DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.note AS casting_note,
    co.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ti.info AS additional_info,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t.id) AS total_cast_count
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
JOIN 
    aka_name p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
    AND co.country_code = 'US'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    p.name ASC
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
movie_cast AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, c.id AS cast_id, c.person_id, c.role_id, c.note,
           cc.subject_id
    FROM complete_cast cc
    INNER JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
),
us_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, co.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    INNER JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    WHERE co.country_code = 'US'
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    INNER JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_additional AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info
    FROM movie_info mi
    INNER JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
)
SELECT
    mb.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    mc2.note AS casting_note,
    uc.name AS company_name,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ma.info AS additional_info,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY mb.id) AS total_cast_count
FROM
    movie_base mb
INNER JOIN movie_cast mc2 ON mb.id = mc2.movie_id
INNER JOIN aka_name p ON mc2.person_id = p.person_id
INNER JOIN role_type r ON mc2.role_id = r.id
INNER JOIN us_companies uc ON mb.id = uc.movie_id
INNER JOIN movie_kw mkw ON mb.id = mkw.movie_id
LEFT JOIN movie_additional ma ON mb.id = ma.movie_id
ORDER BY
    mb.production_year DESC,
    p.name ASC
